title: Circa: Humans 2.0
full_description: Ten bodies appear in a flash of light, move in harmony for a fleeting moment and then descend into a sinuous trance, with towers that grow and decay, bodies that leap and are caught, as physical limits are pushed to their extreme. Digging deeper into the power of the ensemble. Can we ever find a perfect balance, or is adapting to constant change the only way forward? Pulsing music by Ori Lichtik, dramatic lighting by Paul Jackson.
ai_summary: Circa's ensemble circus work extends their Humans inquiry — ten performers building and collapsing towers of bodies in perfect unison, pushed to physical extremes, asking whether harmony is ever truly achievable or only glimpsed in passing.
